title: Percentages Practice 1
questionText: A value 40 is increased by 5%. What is the new value?

title: Profit and Loss Practice 2
questionText: An article costs Rs. 110 and is sold at a profit of 9%. Find the selling price.
explanation: Selling price = cost price x (100 + profit%)/100 = 110 x 109/100 = Rs. 120.

title: Simple Interest Practice 3
questionText: A can finish a task in 12 days and B can finish it in 18 days. What is their combined one-day work?
explanation: A's work per day is 1/12 and B's is 1/18. Together = 1/12 + 1/18 = 30/216.

title: Compound Interest Practice 4
questionText: Find the next number in the series: 5, 11, 17, 23, 29, ?
explanation: The series increases by a constant difference of 6. Therefore the next term is 29 + 6 = 35.

title: Time and Work Practice 5
questionText: Choose the closest meaning of the word "AMBIGUOUS".
explanation: "ambiguous" most closely means "unclear" in placement verbal ability contexts.

title: Time Speed Distance Practice 6
questionText: A value 45 is increased by 30%. What is the new value?

title: Averages Practice 7
questionText: An article costs Rs. 160 and is sold at a profit of 14%. Find the selling price.
explanation: Selling price = cost price x (100 + profit%)/100 = 160 x 114/100 = Rs. 182.

title: Ratio and Proportion Practice 8
questionText: A can finish a task in 10 days and B can finish it in 18 days. What is their combined one-day work?
explanation: A's work per day is 1/10 and B's is 1/18. Together = 1/10 + 1/18 = 28/180.

title: Number System Practice 9
questionText: Find the next number in the series: 5, 8, 11, 14, 17, ?
explanation: The series increases by a constant difference of 3. Therefore the next term is 17 + 3 = 20.

title: Permutation and Combination Practice 10
questionText: Choose the closest meaning of the word "CONCISE".
explanation: "concise" most closely means "brief and clear" in placement verbal ability contexts.

explanation: The series increases by a constant difference of 4. Therefore the next term is 21 + 4 = 25.

title: Directions Practice 65
questionText: Choose the closest meaning of the word "RESILIENT".
explanation: "resilient" most closely means "able to recover" in placement verbal ability contexts.

title: Seating Arrangement Practice 66
questionText: A value 45 is increased by 20%. What is the new value?

title: Puzzles Practice 67
questionText: An article costs Rs. 260 and is sold at a profit of 14%. Find the selling price.
explanation: Selling price = cost price x (100 + profit%)/100 = 260 x 114/100 = Rs. 296.

title: Analogy Practice 68
questionText: A can finish a task in 18 days and B can finish it in 18 days. What is their combined one-day work?
explanation: A's work per day is 1/18 and B's is 1/18. Together = 1/18 + 1/18 = 36/324.

title: Data Sufficiency Practice 69
questionText: Find the next number in the series: 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, ?
explanation: The series increases by a constant difference of 5. Therefore the next term is 25 + 5 = 30.

title: Clocks and Calendars Practice 70
questionText: Choose the closest meaning of the word "METICULOUS".
explanation: "meticulous" most closely means "very careful" in placement verbal ability contexts.

title: Number Series Practice 71
questionText: A value 50 is increased by 5%. What is the new value?

title: Blood Relations Practice 72
questionText: An article costs Rs. 110 and is sold at a profit of 9%. Find the selling price.
explanation: Selling price = cost price x (100 + profit%)/100 = 110 x 109/100 = Rs. 120.
